purpose: Test every mapped frontier solo and multiple four-frontier HoloAgent rotations, including Grok 4.3 as a HoloAgent, under the same frozen finance packet, judge panel, turn budget, word band, validity gate, and rollup/insight extraction.
judge_panel_policy: Use the same four frontier judges. Primary scoring excludes same-provider judge rows for the solo being evaluated; excluded rows remain diagnostic.

one_to_one_comparison_contract.comparison_unit: Each Frontier4 route generates one Holo final. Each valid frontier solo final is paired 1:1 against that Holo final in blinded judge packets.

balance_rule: Across the four Frontier4 routes, each frontier model appears six total analyst turns. Each model bookends one route.

chart_units.description: Rows are Frontier4 routes; columns are frontier solo conditions; cell is Holo minus solo primary no-self-DNA gap.
Compare lift when each frontier model opens/closes versus appears in middle turns.
Compare routes with Grok bookend versus Grok middle-turn participation and versus Grok solo.
Compare generation token ratio, latency ratio, and score lift by route.

recommended_run_order.command: Repeat one at a time for frontier4_order_b_opus_bookend, frontier4_order_c_gemini_bookend, and frontier4_order_d_grok_bookend.

interpretation_rule: Do not claim Frontier4 route-insensitive lift until all four Frontier4 routes have run or missing routes are explicitly labeled. Report Grok solo, Grok middle-turn, and Grok bookend results separately.
